prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, recreate the same selfie composition as a simplified hand-drawn doodle portrait. Keep the person’s pose, clothing, cap, sunglasses, and the raised beer glass in the same positions, but transform everything into a rough sketch style with bold black outlines, loose scribbled fill, and flat minimal color on a plain white background. Remove the outdoor scenery entirely. Keep the beer logo simplified and change the visible text on the glass to the single vertical word BEER. Make the beer a bright saturated yellow, render the shirt in white and the overshirt and cap in vivid blue, and keep the face area blank/obscured as in the reference-driven result.
